sql_array: CREATE TABLE authors (id INT, name NVARCHAR(100), details XML);
INSERT INTO authors (id, name, details) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', '<author><bio>Author of many books</bio></author>');
UPDATE authors SET details = xquery_eval('<author><bio>Updated bio</bio></author>', details) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, name, xquery_eval('<authors>{$name}/bio</authors>', details) FROM authors WHERE xpath_contains(details, '//bio[. = "Updated bio"]', details);
